title: Backend Logic - Share Campaign
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-036' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-036' to ingest requirements
Create/Update Test File for LCOMP-002 business logic
Implement core business logic/services in `backend/app/` for LCOMP-002
Run Pytest to verify logic behaves as defined in the Logical Component
definition_of_done: Logic accurately reflects the constraints of LCOMP-002
Tests pass covering success and failure paths
All modified source files have @trace annotation
